case_title: LARKIN INC. VS. SHIPBY.COM LLC DBA SOUTH BAY FREIGHT

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LARKIN INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SHIPBY.COM LLC DBA SOUTH BAY FREIGHT PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS ARE GOVERNED BY THE SB FREIGHT PALLET RATE PROGRAM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,343.10 FILED BY LARKIN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SHIPBY.COM LLC DBA SOUTH BAY FREIGHT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-12-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SHIPBY.COM LLC DBA SOUTH BAY FREIGHT
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-15-2016 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LARKIN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SHIPBY.COM LLC DBA SOUTH BAY FREIGHT
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF LARKIN INC.
ORDER GRANTING REQUEST TO POST PONE TRIAL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-12-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO NOV-15-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-15-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-15-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE KAREN WONG, OFFICE ADMINSTRATOR FOR LARKIN, INC., AND XIAO RU HE, OFFICE MANAGER FOR SHIPBY COM LLC, DBA SOUTH BAY FREIGHT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-26-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SHIPBY.COM LLC DBA SOUTH BAY FREIGHT
